case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. JIMMY XERXES DORABJEE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SPOHN--INVESTIGATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2013 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DORABJEE, JIMMY XERXES $2,240.20 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,390.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,240.70 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT DORABJEE, JIMMY XERXES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
